title: elettaria walang
side_effects: Elettaria walang can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and digestive issues. Some people may experience nausea, vomiting, or diarrhea after consuming Elettaria walang, especially in large quantities. Additionally, individuals with sensitive skin or allergies may experience redness, itching, or rashes after applying Elettaria walang topically. In rare cases, excessive consumption of Elettaria walang may also lead to headaches, dizziness, or an increase in heart rate.
